/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_if__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmotor_if__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_if__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/motor_if/srv/detail/motor_pos__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/install/lib: /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
